'''Shane Kenward''' (born 7 March 1972) is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for the [[Canberra Raiders]], [[Gold Coast Chargers]], [[St. George Dragons]], [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], and the [[North Queensland Cowboys]], as a {{rlp|fb|ce|fe}} or {{rlp|pr}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>
